restaurant.name: Komodo Lounge Floreasca
restaurant.description: A premium lounge restaurant in Bucharest, blending Mediterranean and Asian cuisine with an extensive cocktail menu, fine wines, and hookah (narghilea) service.

hours.note: Three separate schedules apply: lounge hours, kitchen hours, and sushi hours.

happy_hour.description: Promotional prices on hookah (narghilea). Second hookah 50% off.

policies.bot_language_note: Detect the customer's language and respond in the same language throughout the conversation.
policies.walk_ins_note: Walk-ins are welcome. Reservations recommended for groups and weekend evenings.
policies.age_restriction: Hookah (narghilea) service is available for guests aged 18+ only.

terrace.description: Outdoor terrace. Hookah (narghilea) is available both indoors and outdoors.

seating.hookah_note: Narghilea can be ordered at any table, indoors or outdoors.

options.name: Narghilea Clasică
options.description: Consultați-vă cu Shisha Master-ul nostru pentru a descoperi mixuri din gama noastră variată.
options.description_en: Consult our Shisha Master to discover mixes from our varied range.
options.description_ru: Проконсультируйтесь с нашим Shisha Master для выбора микса из нашего ассортимента.

options.name: Narghilea Cocktail Vase
options.description: Bolul narghilelei este umplut cu un mix special de cocktail non-alcoolic care intensifică aroma fumului.
options.description_en: The hookah bowl is filled with a special non-alcoholic cocktail mix that intensifies the smoke aroma.
options.description_ru: Чаша кальяна заполнена специальным безалкогольным коктейльным миксом, усиливающим аромат дыма.

options.name: Narghilea Premium
options.description: Shisha cu fruit bowl — aromele fructelor proaspete se împletesc cu mixuri atent alese.
options.description_en: Hookah with a fruit bowl — fresh fruit aromas combined with carefully selected mixes.
options.description_ru: Кальян с фруктовой чашей — ароматы свежих фруктов в сочетании с тщательно подобранными миксами.

happy_hour.offer: 50% discount on the second hookah ordered.

reservations.hookah_note: If the guest wants hookah (narghilea), note it in special requests. Narghilea is available both indoors and outdoors. Age 18+ only.

human_handoff.response_ro: Înțeleg că aveți nevoie de asistență directă. Puteți contacta echipa noastră la 📞 +40731555558 sau vizitați-ne la Calea Floreasca 60, București. Suntem deschiși zilnic 10:00–02:00.
human_handoff.response_en: I understand you need direct assistance. Please contact our team at 📞 +40731555558 or visit us at Calea Floreasca 60, Bucharest. We are open daily 10:00–02:00.
human_handoff.response_ru: Понимаю, вам нужна прямая помощь. Вы можете связаться с нашей командой по телефону 📞 +40731555558 или посетить нас по адресу Calea Floreasca 60, Бухарест. Мы открыты ежедневно 10:00–02:00.
